div.p: Patwari users only — Excel matches the standard roster layout: one row per affected village × project where that Patwari is assigned on the village master.
Columns (Hindi + Email): स. क्र., तहसील, तहसीलदार, Sub Division, SDM, विभाग / department, परियोजना (with project code if set), ग्राम (with village code if set), पटवारी, मोबाइल, Email, Status (DONE).
Rows are sorted by department (then project, तहसील, ग्राम, पटवारी) so the same विभाग sits together before cells merge.

Unmapped-looking rows? A Patwari with no villages linked on the user record exports as contact-only (blank geography/project columns). Leave the checkbox below off (default) to omit them from the file, or enable it to audit who still needs villages assigned.
Open from the main menu: Reports → Export Patwari Users Report.
District Administrators only see Patwaris in their district.
